description: The lake embankment built during Bai Juyi's tenure as the governor of Hangzhou is most beautiful in spring when peach blossoms and willow catkins are in full bloom.
Showcasing traditional handicrafts and modern arts and crafts of Hangzhou, including various categories such as silk, embroidery, and carving.
One of the New Ten Scenes of West Lake, where nine streams converge, offering particularly enchanting views in autumn.
A well-preserved historic district featuring typical Jiangnan water town architecture with a strong local lifestyle atmosphere.
The most important comprehensive museum in Zhejiang Province, housing a rich collection of historical artifacts and artistic treasures, located on the picturesque Solitary Hill.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a garden attraction famous for viewing red koi fish, especially beautiful during spring when flowers bloom.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, the legendary meeting place of Bai Suzhen and Xu Xian, marking the starting point of the northern shore of West Lake.
A reconstructed ancient pagoda with a history of over a thousand years, offering panoramic views of West Lake and closely associated with the legend of 'The Legend of the White Snake.'
The most representative historic and cultural district in Hangzhou, preserving Ming and Qing architectural styles and featuring a variety of specialty shops.
A large-scale live-action performance set against natural landscapes, blending Hangzhou culture with modern art, performed at night on West Lake.
